title: rubus koehleri var. cognatus
intro: Rubus koehleri var. cognatus, also known as Cognatus Raspberry or Cognatus Black Raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus koehleri plant, a type of raspberry native to East Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content. The health benefits of Rubus koehleri var. cognatus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Rubus koehleri var. cognatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
